comments.text: Vahiyaat company hai..logon ko abhi samajh nahi aaraha hai..jab need hogi tab ye company fraud karegi
comments.author: @mayankagarwal2464

comments.text: Tu bas apna frustration nikal rha he , story puri pta nhi he so no comments on it , but tum logo ke saath hi problem aati he , meri 6 lakh claim icici ne 25 minutes me settled ki ...
comments.author: @s....982

comments.text: Mere sath jo hua to sach much cheating hai. Ek aadmi aaya document review karne aur ICICI Lombard me ja k bola ki customer ko claim nahi chahiye aur wo man gae aur claim reject kar dia. Fir aaj tak sab call center walo ne sab ne alag alag bahane banae magar koi claim reactivate nahi kia. Mujhe sach much ICICI ne cheat kia. Abhi IRDAI me request kia hai maine. Is k baad consumer court bhi jaunga mai. Tumhara claim dia hai to you are lucky but mere sath galat kia hai in logo ne is me koi shak nahi hai. You or any 1 should not go through this but agar kabhi tumhare sath aisa hi aur tumhe koi aisa bolega ki tum frustration nikal rahe ho tab you will feel the pain. By the way saare evidence mere pas hai mai bus prarthna karta hu ki bus normally thik ho jae nahi to consumer court me mai sare video aur audio recording dikhaunga aur sunaunga. I still hope justice will be served against this frawd ICICI Lombard !!!
comments.author: @vlogsbydhirajkumarjaiswal
